title: Write ferrum_extlib_smtp.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_smtp: RFC 5321 SMTP + RFC 5322 messages + DKIM + DANE MX. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: SMTP client and server, AUTH (PLAIN, XOAUTH2), PIPELINING, STARTTLS, SIZE, 8BITMIME, SMTPUTF8 (RFC 6531), DKIM signing+verification, DANE enforcement for outbound MX, message construction API.
